one_time_description: Negotiation Support Fund loan forgiveness from Canada effective March 31, 2020
economic_notes: TWN has extensive real estate development and natural resources enterprises through government business partnerships. Government businesses had total revenue of $75,583,860 and expenses of $56,338,564 in 2020. Enterprises include real estate development (Blue Eagle, Red Eagle, Urban Eagle, White Eagle, Tsleil-Waututh Land LP, Takaya Developments, Qwi:quelstom) and natural resources/energy entities. MST Development Corporation held as significant influence investment (33.33%).
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Nation is in BC not AB. Large one-time loan forgiveness of $7,868,607 from Canada for Negotiation Support Fund recognized in operations. Prior year (2019) had $22,807,714 from Government of Canada related to treaty/settlement activity driving large 2019 surplus of $37M. 33 entities accounted for under modified equity (government business enterprises and partnerships) with total GBE assets of $135M and revenue of $75.6M not fully consolidated line-by-line. CMHC mortgages of $4,188,755 are separate from long-term debt note total of $22,597; total long-term debt including CMHC mortgages is approximately $4,211,352. Remuneration schedule not included in provided text. Annual debt service includes $21,554,301 repayment of long-term debt plus $211,349 social housing debt repayment. Olympic Legacy Trust investments of $24,330,805 included in cash and cash equivalents as funds held in trust. Accumulated remeasurement losses at year end of $(791,521) due to portfolio investment market value decline.
